description: Fix 20 critical+high bugs in the email section: counts system, SSR/API parity, conversation crashes, entity pagination, action error handling, dead code cleanup.

userStories.title: Fix RPC get_email_counts + add per-source unread counts
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see correct email counts immediately on page load so that I know how many emails need my attention.
acceptanceCriteria: RPC get_email_counts_v2 removes get_my_profile_ids() guard (SECURITY DEFINER + p_team_id is sufficient)
RPC returns folder counts (inbox, processed, sent, archive) + source_counts JSONB (email_connection_id → unread_count)
SSR page.tsx calls new RPC with service role client and gets non-zero counts
Migration applies cleanly via supabase db push
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Migration 20260305100000. Removed get_my_profile_ids() EXISTS guard. Added source_counts JSONB via correlated subquery with jsonb_object_agg. page.tsx returns {counts, sourceCounts}. Sidebar wired to use sourceCounts for badges.

userStories.title: Wire source counts to sidebar + SSR initial fetch parity
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see per-mailbox unread badges and have the initial inbox show only unread emails (matching API behavior).
acceptanceCriteria: page.tsx passes sourceCounts to MailClient; MailClient passes to sidebar
Sidebar shows per-connection unread count badges (hide when 0)
Toutes les boites badge shows sum of source unread counts
SSR getInitialEmails adds .eq('status', 'unread') to match API inbox query
Emails no longer disappear on first folder switch
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: sourceCounts wired through full chain: RPC→page.tsx→MailClient→sidebar. SSR now filters status=unread matching API inbox logic. Partially done in US-001 (wiring), completed here (SSR parity fix).

userStories.title: Centralize count adjustments with adjustCounts helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single adjustCounts function so that archive/delete/mark actions always adjust the correct folder count.
acceptanceCriteria: adjustCounts(action, currentFolder) function created in mail-client.tsx
handleArchive uses adjustCounts — decrements current folder, increments archive
handleDelete/handleSoftDelete use adjustCounts — decrement current folder only
handleMarkAsProcessed uses adjustCounts — inbox-1, processed+1
handleMarkAsUnprocessed uses adjustCounts — inbox+1, processed-1
handleBlacklist uses adjustCounts with correct folder awareness
handleReplySent uses adjustCounts — sent+1
No more hardcoded counts.inbox -= 1 anywhere
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: 7 handlers migrated. adjustCounts is pure function (prev, action, folder) → next. Blacklist bulk path kept server-side archivedCount. Also fixed handleArchive invalidateCache to use currentFolder instead of hardcoded 'inbox'. Added currentFolder to 4 dep arrays.

userStories.title: Fix realtime INSERT + source count overwrite guard
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want new email arrivals to always update the inbox badge even when I'm viewing another folder.
acceptanceCriteria: handleRealtimeNewEmail always increments counts.inbox for received emails regardless of currentFolder
fetchEmails success path: only overwrite counts[folderKey] when selectedSource === 'all'
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Split realtime handler: count increment (always) vs list prepend (folder-matching only). Added source === 'all' guard on fetchEmails count overwrite.

userStories.title: Fix mark processed/unprocessed — remove from list + rollback
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want emails to disappear from inbox when I mark them as processed, and I want failed actions to rollback properly.
acceptanceCriteria: handleMarkAsProcessed: if currentFolder=inbox, filter email out of realEmails + select next email
handleMarkAsUnprocessed: if currentFolder=processed, filter email out of realEmails + select next email
Both handlers save previousEmails/previousCounts before optimistic update
Both handlers rollback in catch block (same pattern as handleArchive)
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Optimistic removal when folder matches (inbox→processed removes from inbox list, processed→inbox removes from processed list). Next email selected by adjacent index. Full rollback on failure (emails, counts, selectedId).

userStories.title: Fix conversation chevron crash + drafts folder
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to expand/collapse conversation groups without crashes, and the drafts folder should not show all emails.
acceptanceCriteria: conversation-group.tsx: handleToggle removed, chevron button onClick inlined with stopPropagation + setIsExpanded
Clicking chevron expands/collapses conversation without TypeError
email.repository.ts: drafts folder returns empty array instead of unfiltered query
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Root cause: handleToggle(e) called without event arg from onClick → e.stopPropagation() TypeError. Drafts was missing from folder switch → fell through with no filters → returned ALL emails.

userStories.title: Fix entity email pagination
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see all emails linked to a building/lot/contact, not just the first 20.
acceptanceCriteria: mail-client.tsx: entityPaginationOffset state added (reset on entity click)
handleEntityClick uses data.pagination.total for totalEmails (not data.emails.length)
handleLoadMore: if entityFilter active, calls entity API with entityPaginationOffset
Load-more correctly appends entity emails and increments offset
Clearing entity filter resets entityPaginationOffset
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: entityPaginationOffset tracks entity-specific page position. handleLoadMore now has dual path: entity API vs folder fetchEmails. Reset on folder change, source change, entity click, and clear filter.

userStories.title: Fix load-more guard + stale-while-revalidate race
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want pagination to work even with sent reply enrichment, and archived emails should not reappear after background refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: handleLoadMore guard uses offset < totalEmails instead of realEmails.length < totalEmails
optimisticRemovals ref (Set<string>) added to mail-client.tsx
Archive/delete/softDelete adds emailId to optimisticRemovals
Stale-while-revalidate background refresh filters out IDs in optimisticRemovals
Hard refresh (cache miss/sync) clears optimisticRemovals
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: optimisticRemovals Set tracks IDs removed via archive/delete/softDelete. Background refresh filters them out. Rollback removes from set. Sync clears entirely.

userStories.title: PATCH validation + attachment team verification
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the email PATCH endpoint to validate input and the attachment route to use team_members for authorization.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/emails/[id]/route.ts: Zod schema validates allowed fields (status, building_id, lot_id, deleted, restored)
Unknown fields are rejected with 400 error
app/api/emails/[id]/attachments/[attachmentId]/route.ts: uses team_members lookup instead of userProfile.team_id
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Zod .strict() schema rejects unknown fields. Attachment route now queries team_members for active team IDs instead of stale users.team_id.

userStories.title: Loading state for email body + sent replies body_html
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see a loading indicator when an email body is being fetched, and sent replies in threads should show full content.
acceptanceCriteria: mail-client.tsx: loadingEmailBodyId state added, set during fetchFullEmail, passed to EmailDetail
EmailDetail shows skeleton/spinner when loadingEmailBodyId matches current email
email.repository.ts getSentRepliesForThreads: body_html added to select columns
Conversation thread view shows full HTML for sent replies (not 'Aucun contenu')
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: loadingEmailBodyId state set during entity email body fetch. Skeleton animation with 4 lines. body_html re-added to getSentRepliesForThreads select.

userStories.title: Minor fixes: mark-irrelevant, forward body, empty state, i18n
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want mark-irrelevant to work correctly, forward to include email body, and the UI to be consistently in French.
acceptanceCriteria: mark-irrelevant-dialog.tsx: soft_delete path removes onArchive call, toast says 'Email masque'
email-detail.tsx buildForwardBody: uses extractTextFromHtml(body_html) as fallback when body_text is empty
mail-client.tsx empty state: text translated to French
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Removed onArchive prop from dialog (was causing double count decrement). Forward fallback uses extractTextFromHtml. Empty state translated to FR.

userStories.title: Dead code cleanup + missing deps fix
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unused code removed and useCallback dependencies correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove fetchCounts callback (dead code)
Remove handleMarkAsRead callback (never called)
Remove handleLinkBuilding callback + linkToBuilding from client service (dead code)
Remove dead setOffset(0) calls in handlers
Fix missing deps in useCallback arrays (handleBlacklist, etc.)
Activate fetchEmailConnections to refresh source counts on polling
Lint passes on modified files
userStories.notes: Removed: fetchCounts, fetchEmailConnections, handleMarkAsRead, handleLinkBuilding (+ onLinkBuilding prop from EmailDetail + linkToBuilding from EmailClientService). Removed dead setOffset(0) in folder change useEffect and handleSourceChange. Fixed handleSync missing invalidateCache dep. Replaced 4 count queries in refresh API with single get_email_counts RPC (returns sourceCounts). Wired onRefresh to update sourceCounts from polling.
